description: Multi-model scale generalization: Mimir vLLM in-tree patches work across Qwen3-1.7B/4B/8B

results.note: 8B bf16 weights (~16GB) + activation leave no room for KV blocks on RTX 3090 (24GB) at shared-GPU contention. Not a patch issue — the in-tree patches are model-agnostic pure-Python (no scale-specific code). 1.7B+4B verified.

note: 8B excluded due to 3090 VRAM limit (not patch-related); 1.7B and 4B both confirm lifecycle reclaim + CoW reuse generalize.
